---
description: Enter explore mode - think through ideas, investigate problems, clarify requirements
agent: Explore
argument-hint: Topic to explore (idea, problem, or change name)
---

Use the **openspec-explore** skill to enter explore mode.

Pass the user's input (if any) as the topic to explore — could be a vague idea, specific problem, change name, or comparison.

The stance, visualization approach, OpenSpec awareness, and guardrails are defined in the skill — follow them exactly.
